surface_verification.justification: CI-workflow + allowlist + docs change only; no application runtime surface to exercise. The behavior is verified by the CI-gate guard tests (incl. the live-repo TestRealRepo checks) and by this PR's own CI run of the warn-only diff-cover step.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 - the ci.yml diff-cover step gates changed-line coverage at --fail-under=80 over the combined coverage.xml
AC2 - the step keeps continue-on-error:true (warn-only settling window) so it WARNS without blocking merge
AC3 - the step is renamed 'Diff coverage (warn-only gate)' and stays ordered after the Combine step
behaviors.evidence: test_ci_coverage_wiring.py::{test_diff_coverage_step_is_warn_only_gate name lookup, test_combine_runs_before_diff_after_all_tiers ordering with the new name}

behaviors.behavior: AC4 - the ci_gate_allowlist entry is renamed + kept tracked-debt; the live-repo CI-gate guard stays green (renamed loose step allowlisted, no stale entry, no non-allowlisted loose gate)
AC5a - the run body captures diff-cover's exit code (|| rc=$?) and re-raises it (exit "$rc") after printing the report, so the markdown report shows even when --fail-under trips
behaviors.evidence: test_ci_coverage_wiring.py::test_diff_coverage_step_is_warn_only_gate (asserts rc=$?, exit "$rc", cat diff-cover.md in the run body)

behaviors.behavior: AC5b - the GitHub Actions runner surfaces the tripped gate as a step FAILURE annotation while continue-on-error keeps the job green (warn-not-block)
behaviors.reason: continue-on-error step semantics execute only on the GitHub Actions runner; verified by this PR's own CI run, not by a local unit test

behaviors.behavior: AC6 - no stale 'Diff coverage (informational)' references remain across the load-bearing files (ci.yml + allowlist + guard tests) after the rename
behaviors.evidence: test_check_ci_gate_coverage_io.py::TestRealRepo::test_live_allowlist_has_no_stale_entries + the test_ci_coverage_wiring.py step-name lookups fail on any stale ci.yml/allowlist reference; grep-verified no other stale references
